name: Lateral Movement Indicators
description: Composite profile for detecting lateral movement techniques: Pass-the-Hash (4624 Type 3 with NTLM), Pass-the-Ticket (4768/4769 with anomalous encryption), PSExec/WMI execution patterns, SMB share access, and explicit credential use. Correlate events across multiple logs.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

correlation_rules.name: Pass-the-Hash Indicator
correlation_rules.description: 4624 Type 3 + NTLM auth + non-machine account from remote IP

correlation_rules.name: Kerberoasting
correlation_rules.description: 4769 with RC4 (0x17) encryption type — weak ticket encryption indicates Kerberoasting

correlation_rules.name: Golden Ticket Indicator
correlation_rules.description: 4768 with anomalous encryption or non-DC source

event_descriptions.4624: Successful logon — LogonType=3 (Network) + NTLM = Pass-the-Hash candidate. LogonType=9 (NewCredentials) = runas /netonly.
event_descriptions.4648: Logon with explicit credentials — SubjectUserName, TargetUserName, TargetServerName. Indicates PSExec, WMI, or runas.
event_descriptions.4672: Special privileges assigned — check for SeTcbPrivilege, SeDebugPrivilege on unexpected accounts
event_descriptions.4697: Service installed — common PSExec/Impacket persistence mechanism
event_descriptions.4768: Kerberos TGT requested — check EncryptionType (0x17=RC4 may be golden ticket)
event_descriptions.4769: Kerberos service ticket requested — TicketEncryptionType 0x17 (RC4) on AES domain = Kerberoasting or silver ticket
event_descriptions.4771: Kerberos pre-authentication failed — brute force or password spray
event_descriptions.4776: NTLM authentication — Workstation field shows source. Empty/anomalous = PTH indicator.
event_descriptions.4777: Domain controller failed to validate credentials
event_descriptions.5140: Network share accessed — ShareName (C$, ADMIN$ = administrative share access)
event_descriptions.5145: Network share object access checked — ShareName, RelativeTargetName, AccessMask
event_descriptions.7045: Service installed — PSExec installs PSEXESVC; Impacket installs random-named services
event_descriptions.1: Sysmon: Process creation — look for cmd.exe/powershell.exe spawned by unusual parents (wmi, dllhost, svchost)
event_descriptions.3: Sysmon: Network connection — lateral tool outbound connections
